scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test tests/*.test.ts
scripts.test:webgpu:dam-break-regression: FLUID_SCENE=dam-break-ui FLUID_METHOD=quadtree-tall-cell FLUID_TARGET_S=0.2 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 FLUID_FIELD_STATS=1 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
scripts.test:webgpu:dam-quadtree-quality: FLUID_SCENE=dam-break-ui FLUID_METHOD=quadtree-tall-cell FLUID_TARGET_S=0.2 FLUID_STABILITY_ENVELOPE=1 FLUID_CHECKPOINT_EVERY_S=0.05 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 FLUID_FIELD_STATS=1 FLUID_DISABLE_TIMESTAMPS=1 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
scripts.test:webgpu:quadtree-matrix: FLUID_SCENE=all FLUID_METHOD=quadtree-tall-cell FLUID_TARGET_S=0.2 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
scripts.test:webgpu:dam-conservation: FLUID_SCENE=dam-break-boxes FLUID_METHOD=tall-cell FLUID_TARGET_S=5 FLUID_REGULAR_LAYERS=12 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 FLUID_FIELD_STATS=1 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
scripts.native:run: cd native && swift run -c release FluidMetal
scripts.test:webgpu:dam-tall-active: FLUID_SCENE=dam-break-ui FLUID_METHOD=tall-cell,uniform FLUID_TARGET_S=2 FLUID_REGULAR_LAYERS=24 FLUID_STABILITY_ENVELOPE=1 FLUID_CHECKPOINT_EVERY_S=0.25 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 FLUID_SURFACE_TENSION=0 FLUID_DISABLE_TIMESTAMPS=1 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
scripts.test:webgpu:dam-tall-soak: FLUID_SCENE=dam-break-ui FLUID_METHOD=tall-cell FLUID_TARGET_S=5 FLUID_REGULAR_LAYERS=24 FLUID_STABILITY_ENVELOPE=1 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 FLUID_SURFACE_TENSION=0 FLUID_DISABLE_TIMESTAMPS=1 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
scripts.test:webgpu:single-tall-cell: FLUID_SCENE=dam-break-ui FLUID_METHOD=tall-cell,uniform FLUID_SINGLE_TALL_CELL=15,10,4 FLUID_TARGET_S=0.004 FLUID_ORACLE_STEPS=1 FLUID_CHECKPOINT_EVERY_S=0.004 FLUID_STABILITY_ENVELOPE=1 FLUID_CPU_ORACLE=0 FLUID_SURFACE_TENSION=0 FLUID_DISABLE_TIMESTAMPS=1 node --import tsx tools/run-webgpu-smoke.ts
